stem: A right circular cone has a height of 33 centimeters (cm) and a base with a diameter of 6 cm. The volume of this cone is nπ cm³. What is the value of n?
rationale: The correct answer is 99. The radius is 6/2 = 3 cm. The volume of a cone is (1/3)πr²h = (1/3)π(9)(33) = 99π cm³. Therefore n = 99.
